review_title: Best Javascript IDE for developers
author: William A.
pros: Webstorm is very easy to use, it has brilliant features that make coding easier and faster, and the ability to work faster through seamless code debugging. My favourite is the code with me feature.
cons: There is no least favourite feature at the time of writing

review_title: Best linux IDE for Frontend devs
author: Param P.
pros: Best part about working with webstorm is its not a text editor, its complete IDE which makes my end to end development process easy as i done have to leave my application to debug. Its provides really claver code suggestions and provides great support when working with different framework. It also comes with git blame and we can create github PR and even review those to work with team.
cons: Its has really some of and most feature and sometimes getting used to them or learing to use them can have bit of learing curve

review_title: Webstorm Is Too Complex but Too Heavy
description: The program's opening time is too long (I'm using SSD) and it use too much RAM, but don't forget it, it is an IDE. I switched to VS Code because it is lightweight and it can be really functional with extensions. I wasn't use the lots of functions of WebStorm and VS Code has all i needs so I switched. It is all about your needing and computer (If you don't have enogh RAM, WebStorm will become a nightmare).
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - It is all completed Web Programming IDE. - It has lots of functions built-in. - Free for students.
cons: - Too heavy. For example when I use it, it was freeze for per 4-5 line. (PS: My computer has 8gb RAM). - Too complex and a bit old-fashion UI. - It hasn't enough community plugins.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An IDE for optimal front-end development
description: All in all, WebStrom is optimal for private use as well as for development in a team. In particular, however, it is suitable by the variety of offered templates just to set up a project and test. The versioning and code analysis supports the developer without patronizing and stopping the development process.
author: Marc F.
pros: WebStorm is particularly convincing due to its modular structure and user-friendliness. WebStrom takes up the modularity of frontend development and implements it in an IDE that is oriented towards the development process. WebStorm convinces by the customizability through plugins, by the possibility of versioning for private projects but also for team projects as well as by a comprehensive selection of framework templates. WebStorm also facilitates the development of high-quality code through the code analysis in the background, which supports the code and project structure through author completion and intelligent commenting.
cons: From time to time it is difficult to connect the debugger to newly started Docker containers. It is difficult to connect each newly started container with the debugger. It would be better if one debugger could be started per container.

review_title: Advanced web development tool
author: Youssef B.
pros: WebStorm brings advanced features to the coding process, plugins integrations, different languages support, and most importantly an advanced UI.
cons: The indexing feature may get laggy sometimes and you'll have to restart the application to fix it.

review_title: Great IDE for full stack development for Javascript projects
description: Overall it's been very positive. I have used webstorm for nearly 6 years now, never looked back and now I pay and use this product. It has really improved my development experience.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Graphical user interface is best part for me. Easy git integration makes it elegant to work with Webstorm. Easy to install extra plugins. Debugging using the console very comfortable. Terminal integration with webstorm is also nice, makes it easier for me to work with.
cons: Documentation for all the features and more upgrades would be welcome. GUI can made more elegant. Also more innovative products can be made using GIT website.

review_title: Full Editor
description: After I switched IDEs, my productivity increased by 30%, I attribute this to the excellent plugins that Webstorm has.
author: Silas M.
pros: Excellent plugins, I believe today that it is the best web editor available on the market.
cons: Only 30 days free, could have a 100% free version.

review_title: WebStorm is an extremely handy development tool for UI development
description: More rapid development enables developers to create code rapidly and detect issues during the compilation process. It has support for Sonarqube and Prettify plugins to format the code. It features a plethora of plugins to boost your productivity. You must employ templates, clever auto-completion, and refactoring to assist system maintenance at scale.
author: Ramgopal V.
pros: It's great for Angular or React development, or indeed any javascript-based framework. Integration with code repositories and version control systems is excellent. It contains several shortcuts, an integrated debugger mode, and a variety of libraries for formatting code. It gives you a lot of advice and warns you about any faults you make while you write your code. It also enables us to validate the content of anything we send over FTP and take screenshots of remote servers.
cons: It is more difficult and appears scary than Visual Studio code. It only has a small selection of colour and file icon themes. We can locate superior alternatives in low-cost markets and trade off a few characteristics. Its Windows version is nicely optimized, however, its Linux version did not meet my expectations.

review_title: Best IDE for Javascript & TypeScript Development
description: WebStorm is overall a whole package for web development. I use it daily for both my work and side projects. I would prefer it to any other IDE or TextEditor.
author: Burak Ş.
pros: Refactoring abilities of the application is great. Furthermore, WebStorm is highly extendable with plugins. Default UI is great as well and with themes it is customizable.
cons: Since WebStorm has many features it is resource intensive application. Application can be optimized further for user's with low-end computers.

review_title: The best IDE for Web and JavaScript develpement
author: Jamsly M.
pros: Easy to use even for beginners, full of features, it has a great code assistance that helps you code faster and so useful for those who are new to code, it is by far the best IDE i ever used.
cons: It is not so happy when it runs on about 4gb RAM, it would be great if it could bootstrap project for some node.js frameworks like nest.js and tsed.io

review_title: Solution absolument merveilleuse pour le développement web
description: En tant que développeur web, je remercie WebStorm pour ce merveilleux produit car il s'agit d'un IDE complet où je peux développer, déployer, déboguer et même déboguer à distance. Grande expérience globale
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Un IDE de développement web complet avec toutes les fonctionnalités modernes qu'un IDE doit posséder comme le contrôle de version, l'accès à la base de données, le débogage sont si bons pour avoir une fonctionnalité pour l'environnement de développement web - Construit avec des fonctionnalités puissantes d'IntelliSense qui rendent le codage PHP vraiment génial aussi - Support pour un certain nombre de thèmes et de modules complémentaires, le développeur peut le personnaliser en fonction de ses propres besoins - la prise en charge de SSH et du terminal est prête à l'emploi, vous n'avez pas besoin de passer à d'autres applications de terminal pendant votre développement, comme pour utiliser les commandes git dans terminal ou accéder à SSH. - La prise en charge de l'enregistrement de fichiers en tant que modèles est tout simplement géniale. De plus, ses suggestions de codage à améliorer selon les normes et modèles de codage choisis sont excellentes. - Un grand nombre de raccourcis clavier intégrés ainsi que la fonctionnalité d'ajout de raccourcis personnalisés sont excellents - Il a des modules complémentaires pour prendre en charge différents frameworks. Ce qui est génial - Étant moi-même développeur web, il y a tellement de choses à apprécier WebStorm que je peux même écrire un livre à ce sujet
cons: Avec beaucoup de bonnes fonctionnalités, il y a aussi des problèmes, comme le chargement de projets volumineux. C'est parce qu'il indexe tous les fichiers pour une recherche plus rapide, mais parfois, si le système manque de mémoire, cela peut être très pénible car il peut devenir très lent - Certaines configurations comme les configurations de débogage peuvent être un peu plus difficiles pour les nouveaux utilisateurs, parfois ils peuvent avoir besoin de passer par beaucoup de recherches pour mettre en place un environnement de développement avec toutes les fonctionnalités - Ce n'est pas gratuit ou un peu cher par rapport à d'autres options disponibles

review_title: WebStorm mon IDE préféré
description: Webstorm et parfaitement le logiciel à utiliser au quotidien dans le métier de dev web et il le montre plutôt bien
author: Meddy B.
pros: Les différentes fonctionnalités que met en place l'IDE cela rentre parfaitement dans le cadre de mon travail très simple d'utilisation et service au top
cons: menu un peu brouillon et pas compatible avec tous les langages de programmation qui sortent du web

review_title: Adaptible tool for web devs
author: Maciej M.
pros: - it's allowing to install plugins for different web technologies in one tool - refactoring is easy and intuitive
cons: still it's not as quickly convertible to use along with PHP (better use PHPStorm) or Python (better use Pycharm)

review_title: Best IDE for JavaScript and TypeScript development
author: Blair B.
pros: The tools it gives for refactoring code saves so much time.
cons: It's not as light weight as other IDEs... but it's not a problem.

review_title: Powerful tool for code development
author: Viraj T.
pros: I love the way it lets you reolve conflicts
cons: I wish it had a free version to play around and understand the features

review_title: Gread IDE for web development
author: Karol Ż.
pros: Fast and stable. Good git support. Sync configuration between computers.
cons: Sometimes need to be restarted for back to normal work.

review_title: The best choice when it comes to IDE's for front end development
author: Kristian G.
pros: The IDE is built in such an elegant way that when you develop you start worrying about the little things like auto imports, path resolution and auto complete. And everything comes out of the box too! No need to configure anything.
cons: As for the features, I do not think I can add anything, I believe the team is doing awesome! The only thing is that it is paid, which stalled me to try it out, however since there is a free period, I did try it and I am still using Webstorm until this day. I cannot go back to another editor/IDE for front end development.

review_title: Best IDE on the market
description: WebStorm is, in my opinion, the best JS and TS IDE in the market. It has everything I need and sometimes much more. Everyone I met and talk about that agreed with me. To tell the truth, I cannot express how I like that software. I was using it in my work and my private projects. However, because of the price, I was forced to change my private IDE to another one, as soon as my student license for WebStorm expired. It was quite hard to get used to a program with fewer functionalities. One small disadvantage of the program itself - is it can lag during indexing - which can be annoying. All in all, I still use it in my work and I strongly recommend it for every Dev or QA!
author: Piotr P.
pros: Powerful. Widely integrable. A huge load of built-in functions. Big plugin 'shop' with various plugins. Intuitive to use, with the possibility of complicated adjustments and changes - suited for the user.
cons: For personal use - the price is prohibitive. Sometimes performance is not as smooth as it could be - especially while indexing.

review_title: Is WebStorm a good IDE
description: Overall WebStorm is a great IDE, one of the best out there. I was introduced to WebStorm when I started my first year in Faculty. I have been using it since then and writing code, fixing bugs, and making fully functional web pages has never been easier and faster for me. I truly recommend you try out this software, especially if you are a student in the software development area.
author: Sotir S.
pros: The thing I like about this software is that it gives the students including me a free license to use this IDE and all of the other products of JetBrains. This is very helpful I believe for all the students that are in the computer software industry because with no money we get the privilege of using this awesome tech. Now let me say something about the functionality of WebStorm. It is truly a remarkable piece of software starting with the fact that is very user-friendly. Then you have the best code correction options out there. Not only does it tell you where should you change your code because there is an error or something is off, but it gives you multiple solutions and corrections for you to implement effortlessly with just a click.
cons: I don't think I can say something bad about this software except for the little hustle when you start your first project and opening projects, but there are a lot of tutorials in order to do that without any problems. Also for those who are not students, the price can be a little high for them when starting, but in my personal opinion, I think it is worth it to try out this software(there is a free trial period).

review_title: Why we need WebStorm
description: Finding bugs in a codebase is certainly necessary for us, thus we can run tests directly for some specific list of files see the reports. In the built-in terminal you we can run some pre defined npm or yarn tasks, even set some environment variables from WebStorm runner configuration and then give it a spin for different kind of environments.
author: Burak T.
pros: Rich set of frontend related tools are mostly included into the pre-bundled plugins, which you can disable if you don't need autocompletion etc. not to consume memory
cons: Not so important though, it would be better to have some options to have some plugins to run application servers such as WebLogic, Tomcat etc. But not so necessary for frontend development since we can run similar stuff via command line

review_title: Everything you need in One IDE
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: With Webstorm, you have a single tool to spin up your plain web projects, a react app, react-native app or simply install the framework plugin and get it bootstrapped
cons: Memory intensive, You need atleast a 16GB ram plus, if you do not close the app often and sleep your laptop with it, it hogs memory

review_title: WebStorm review
description: Great experience and no problems so far. A lot of great frameworks are available for launching and meets all needs of a web developer.
author: Ali K.
pros: The main pros are its speed and also the available frameworks that it has and its great debugging features.
cons: Price is a bit high for one developer but for a business it's nothing, other than that nothing comes to my mind.

review_title: Un des meilleurs IDE du marché
description: Webstorm est un (si ce n'est le) meilleur logiciel pour le developpement Web. Les outils développés par JetBrains (IntelliJ, PyCharm, CLion, ...) sont tous de très bons logiciels, et celui-ci en fait partie.
author: Barnabé H.
pros: Webstorm est un logiciel qui comporte tout ce dont un développeur a besoin. Intégration de Git presque parfaite, peu de bugs, toutes les fonctionnalités nécessaires.
cons: L'interface peut parfois être un peu "lourde" et perdre les nouveaux utilisateurs. Webstorm est en lui-même un logiciel gourmand en terme de ressources.

review_title: Un ottimo software per lo sviluppo delle applicazioni web.
description: Usiamo Web Storm, che consiglio vivamente, nello sviluppo e nel debug delle applicazioni web della nostra azienda.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: WebStorm è un ottimo software per lo sviluppo delle applicazioni web funzionando bene su tutti i sistemi operativi e disponendo di molteplici funzioni e modelli che contribuiscono a rendere facile e piacevole il processo di sviluppo. Eccezionali le funzioni di suggerimento, auto-completamento e debug.
cons: WebStorm è un software estremamente potente e quindi richiede un computer con buone prestazione e con una Ram adeguata.
author_profession: Senior Front-End Developer - Web Designer & UI Developer

review_title: WebStorm: The best IDE ever.
author: Armen A.
pros: 1) The IDE provides advanced HTML and CSS editing features, including syntax highlighting, code formatting, and live preview.2) Testing Tools Integration.3) WebStorm offers intelligent code completion, navigation, and analysis, helping developers write clean and efficient code.
cons: 1) While WebStorm offers a free 30-day trial, it is a commercial product, and a license is required for continued use.
